name: Diabetic Sour Cream Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13X9 baking pan.
1. Cream together the margarine and sugar replacement in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add eggs and beat well. Beat in cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt into the creamed mixture alternately with water. Stir in sour cream, raisins, and chopped walnuts.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
5. Let cool completely before serving.
Recipe yields 18 servings
NOTES: 124 calories per serving Exchanges: 1 1/2 bread 1 fat
